rawContent: {"stage":"build","insights":[{"kind":"gotcha","text":"Plan agents spent turns reading 658KB compiled CLI from node_modules instead of finding non-existent src/ files — always check if source files exist before reading compiled output","scope":"pipeline/stages"},{"kind":"lesson","text":"The fix needed is not adding new logging code but ensuring --feedback is parsed and forwarded into ctx.input.feedback — the logger already exists at cli.js:14742","scope":"src/cli.ts"},{"kind":"convention","text":"Build stage injection uses ctx.input.feedback with a 200-char slice limit — any solution must populate this field in the pipeline context","scope":"src/pipeline/context.ts"},{"kind":"decision","text":"TDD approach: write the test first (src/stages/build.test.ts) before modifying source, so the failing test drives the implementation","scope":"testing"}]}
